entity.name: AppAccount

many-to-one.name: transferAndDirectDebitInterbankCode
many-to-one.title: Code list for rejects/return of Direct debit, Wire Transfers and IPO
many-to-one.help: You can select the codes and reasons that will be selectable for rejection reasons of wire transfers, direct debits, IPO, and SEPA direct debits.

many-to-one.name: chequeInterbankCode
many-to-one.title: Code list for rejects/return of Cheques
many-to-one.help: You can select the codes and reasons that will be selectable for cheque rejection reasons.

boolean.name: manageCustomerCredit
boolean.title: Manage customerCredit
boolean.help: This option enables managing customer credit levels and setting a maximum amount. A default maximum accepted credit amount for all customers can be set in the sales configurations per company. The accepted credit amount can also be configured per customer in the accounting information of customer records. You can also view the credit currently used by each customer.

boolean.name: manageAnalyticAccounting
boolean.title: Manage analytic accounting
boolean.help: This configuration enables analytic accounting in the software. Analytic accounting is configurable from the dedicated menus in the accounting module configurations.

boolean.name: manageFactors
boolean.help: This configuration enables factor management and the factoring process.

boolean.name: manageCutOffPeriod
boolean.title: Manage Cut off period
boolean.help: This configuration enables from an accounting perspective the application periods of invoices in order to allow end-of-year adjustments (prepaid expenses/deferred revenue) and spread charges across multiple fiscal years based on the application dates entered on invoices/accounting entries.

integer.name: partnerBalConfigSelect
integer.title: Partner balance viewer configuration
integer.help: You can configure here the balance viewer widget that appears on partner forms in the top right corner by indicating whether you want to see the total partner balance, the due balance, or the recoverable due balance.

boolean.name: manageAdvancePaymentInvoice
boolean.title: Manage advance payment invoice
boolean.help: This configuration enables the advance payment invoice generation feature.

boolean.name: paymentVouchersOnSupplierInvoice
boolean.help: This configuration enables the payment assistant when entering a supplier payment on a supplier invoice/credit note. Otherwise, the standard payment registration form on the invoice will open.

boolean.name: paymentVouchersOnCustomerInvoice
boolean.help: This configuration enables the payment assistant when entering a customer payment on a customer invoice/credit note. Otherwise, the standard payment registration form on the invoice will open.

boolean.name: activatePassedForPayment
boolean.title: Activate passed for payment
boolean.help: This configuration enables Passed for Payment (PFP) management on purchase invoices.

boolean.name: manageFinancialDiscount
boolean.title: Manage financial discount
boolean.help: Configuration enabling the activation of financial discounts.

boolean.name: allowMultiInvoiceTerms
boolean.title: Allow multi invoice terms
boolean.help: This configuration enables for the financial part the management of payment configurations with multiple payment terms. If the payment conditions used are standard (15 days Net, 30 days End of month) then this option does not need to be activated. However, if more specific conditions are used (e.g. 30% Cash, 70% at 30 days) this option must be activated to display the terms table on the relevant documents (Invoices, Move lines...).

string.name: dasActiveNorm
string.title: Current version of N4DS standard
string.help: Version that will be indicated on the N4DS file for the DAS.

boolean.name: activateFixedAssetBarCodeGeneration
boolean.title: Activate bar code generation for fixed asset
boolean.help: This configuration enables barcode printing on fixed assets (based on the reference field).

boolean.name: editFixedAssetBarcodeType
boolean.title: Specify the barcode type by fixed asset
boolean.help: Displayed only if fixed asset barcodes are enabled.

many-to-one.name: fixedAssetBarcodeTypeConfig
many-to-one.title: Fixed asset barcode type
many-to-one.help: You can select the barcode type that will be used by default for all fixed assets. If you want different types per fixed asset, you must enable the Specify the barcode type by fixed asset configuration.

integer.name: dsoComputationPeriod
integer.title: DSO computation period
integer.help: Duration (in days) used for the DSO (Days Sales Outstanding) calculation. This calculation is based on invoices only. Formula: DSO = (Accounts receivable / Revenue) x Number of days in the period.

boolean.name: enableLatePaymentInterest
boolean.title: Enable late payment interest
boolean.help: This configuration enables late payment interest management in case of non-payment.

decimal.name: thresholdAmount
decimal.title: Threshold amount
decimal.help: Threshold amount to generate late payment interest invoices.
